---
title: "snc-tests"
# nocite: '@*'
# bibliography: sebald.bib
# echo: false
# warnings: false
---

first collection [documenting] of materials

## snc
16071.1  
16247.2

```{r, download-img}
#| include: true


1 + 1
cat("the upsidedown")
dlpw<-Sys.getenv("DOWNLOAD_PW")
gc<-Sys.getenv("GIT_TOP")
# download.file("https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/school/api/png/dinge/sebald-stable-diff-001.png","stable-diff.png")
# download.file(sprintf("https://ids.dh-index.org/api/download?file=sebaldiana.jpg&pw=%s",dlpw),extra = "-4 -v -L",method = "curl","sebaldiana.jpg")
#Sys.sleep(10)
size<-file.info(list.files()[grep("sebaldiana.jpg",list.files())])$size
print(size)
#print(dlpw)
# if(dlpw!="")
#     message("dlpw: ",dlpw)
message("gc: ",gc)
image_available <- file.exists("sebaldiana.jpg") && file.size("sebaldiana.jpg") > 400
f<-list.files(".",pattern="qmd")
#fb<-basename(f)
#?basename
f2<-strsplit(f,"\\.")
#f2
fli<-lapply(f2,function(x){
 h1<-paste0(x[1],".html")
 h2<-paste0(x[1],".pdf")
 t<-x[1]
 cl<-paste0('<div class="flist"><ul><li>',t,' ... <a href="',h1,'">.html</a>, <a href="',h2,'">.pdf</a></li></ul></div>')    
})
fli<-unlist(fli)
```

## now alltogether

```{r sebald-image, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (image_available) {
  cat("![Q: Sebaldiana](sebaldiana.jpg){#fig-sebaldiana}\n")
}
cat(fli)
```

<!-- ![Q: Sebaldiana](sebaldiana.jpg){#fig-sebaldiana} -->

<!-- ![stable diffusion output Marienbader Elegie](stable-diff.png){#fig-stable-01} -->

## Q on bricolage
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
#| eval: false
t<-readLines("notes.md")
print(t)
```

```{r}
# predata<-paste0(Sys.getenv("GIT_TOP"),"/SPUND-LX/szondi/docufiction/wg-sebald/preprocessed.RData")
# save.image(file = predata)
```

<!-- {{< include notes.md >}} -->

# references {#references}
